---
listing:
  id: listing-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

:::: {.portfolio-page}

## Systems Research

Recent publications from [TZD Labs Systems Research](https://shakestzd.github.io/Systems/), an ongoing investigation into how AI capital flows through the physical economy.

::: {#systems-articles}
*Loading articles...*
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function() {
  var container = document.getElementById('systems-articles');
  fetch('https://shakestzd.github.io/Systems/articles.json')
    .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function(articles) {
      container.replaceChildren();
      articles.forEach(function(a) {
        var card = document.createElement('div');
        card.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom:1.5rem;';

        var link = document.createElement('a');
        link.href = 'https://shakestzd.github.io/Systems' + a.url;
        link.textContent = a.title;
        link.style.cssText = 'font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;';
        link.target = '_blank';
        link.rel = 'noopener';

        var focus = document.createElement('span');
        focus.textContent = a.focus;
        focus.style.cssText = 'display:inline-block;margin-left:0.5rem;font-size:0.8rem;padding:0.1rem 0.5rem;border-radius:4px;background:#f0f0f0;color:#666;';

        var question = document.createElement('div');
        question.textContent = a.question;
        question.style.cssText = 'margin-top:0.25rem;color:#555;font-size:0.95rem;';

        var meta = document.createElement('div');
        meta.textContent = 'Updated ' + a.updated;
        meta.style.cssText = 'margin-top:0.25rem;color:#999;font-size:0.8rem;';

        card.appendChild(link);
        card.appendChild(focus);
        card.appendChild(question);
        card.appendChild(meta);
        container.appendChild(card);
      });
    })
    .catch(function() {
      container.replaceChildren();
      var fallback = document.createElement('p');
      fallback.textContent = 'Visit ';
      var fallbackLink = document.createElement('a');
      fallbackLink.href = 'https://shakestzd.github.io/Systems/';
      fallbackLink.textContent = 'TZD Labs Systems Research';
      fallbackLink.target = '_blank';
      fallbackLink.rel = 'noopener';
      fallback.appendChild(fallbackLink);
      fallback.appendChild(document.createTextNode(' to see published articles.'));
      container.appendChild(fallback);
    });
})();
</script>
```

## Blog Posts

::: {#listing-posts}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
#systems-articles a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
</style>
```

::::
